widget_id: The name of the converting organization
label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the converting organization:
rationale: Pre-conversion name of the Maine LP. Mirrors MBCA-21 / MBCA-21A which use entity.name for the pre-conversion party regardless of converting entity type. The 'converting organization' IS the filing entity.

widget_id: The form of the converting organization
label_verbatim: The form of the converting organization:
rationale: Free-text legal form of the converting entity (typically 'Limited Partnership' since this form is LP-only, but the widget exists for completeness). NEW key — neither MBCA-21 nor MBCA-21A captured this because their entity types are implied by form scope.

widget_id: The jurisdiction of the converting organizations governing statute
label_verbatim: The jurisdiction of the converting organization's governing statute:
rationale: Jurisdiction whose statute governs the converting entity (typically 'Maine' on this form per 31 MRSA §1324). NEW key — distinct from entity.home_jurisdiction (which is a foreign-qualification concept). Documents the governing law explicitly even when it equals Maine.

label_verbatim: The date of its organization:
rationale: Date the converting LP was originally formed under its governing statute. NEW key — analogous to entity.formation_date_in_home_jurisdiction (foreign-qualification flavor) but unscoped, used when the converting/recital entity may be domestic.

widget_id: The name of the converted resulting organization
label_verbatim: SECOND: The name of the converted (resulting) organization:
rationale: Post-conversion entity name. Same key as MBCA-21 and MBCA-21A (preserves the conversion.new_entity.* convention).

widget_id: The form of the converted resulting organization
label_verbatim: The form of the converted (resulting) organization:
rationale: Free-text type of the resulting entity (e.g., 'Limited Liability Company', 'Business Corporation'). Same key as MBCA-21.

widget_id: The jurisdiction of the converted resulting organizations governing statute
label_verbatim: The jurisdiction of the converted (resulting) organization's governing statute:
rationale: Jurisdiction of the resulting entity's organic statute. NEW sub-key under conversion.new_entity.* — supports cross-jurisdiction conversions where the surviving entity is foreign.

label_verbatim: The date of its organization (resulting org):
rationale: Date the resulting entity was/will be formed under its governing statute. NEW sub-key under conversion.new_entity.*. May be the same as conversion.effective_date if the resulting entity comes into existence on conversion.

widget_id: The address of its principal office is
label_verbatim: The address of its principal office is:
rationale: Single-line principal-office address of the resulting entity. Mirrors MLLC-12's entity.principal_office.physical_address shape (single line).

widget_id: The date the conversion is effective under the governing statute of the converted organization
label_verbatim: THIRD: The date the conversion is effective under the governing statute of the converted organization:
rationale: Required effective date of the conversion under the resulting entity's organic law. NEW key — distinct from MBCA-21's conversion.future_effective_date (which is OPTIONAL — 'if other than the date of filing'). On this form the effective date is required and is determined by the new entity's governing statute, so a separate key avoids conflating the two semantics.

widget_id: The street and mailing address of an office that may be used for service of process under 1435 is 1
label_verbatim: SIXTH: (Foreign Converted Organization Not Authorized to Transact Business in this State Only) The street and mailing address of an office that may be used for service of process under §1435 is:
rationale: First line of the §1435 service-of-process address. Required only when the resulting entity is foreign and not authorized to transact business in Maine (per FOURTH recital and SIXTH header). Two-line widget split with line1/line2 (no street/city_state_zip semantic split available on this template).

widget_id: The street and mailing address of an office that may be used for service of process under 1435 is 2
label_verbatim: (continuation line)
rationale: Second line of the §1435 service-of-process address. Continuation of line1.

widget_id: The organizing document for the converted resulting organization is attached as Exhibit
label_verbatim: SEVENTH: The organizing document for the converted (resulting) organization is attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Inline exhibit letter for the attached organizing document. NEW key — distinct from MBCA-21's conversion.new_entity_provisions_exhibit_letter (which references a 'provisions required to be set forth' subset). MLPA-Conv attaches the WHOLE organizing document, not just the required provisions, so the artifact is different.

label_verbatim: Dated ___
rationale: Date the articles are signed.

widget_id: type or print name and capacity
label_verbatim: (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signature row
rationale: First general-partner signer. Per recital, 'must be signed by each general partner listed in the certificate of limited partnership' — so this is a per-GP signature pattern (Shape E's per-officer-signer-pattern variant), not Shape D filing.signer.*. Reuses general_partner_N.* namespace from MLPA-6 (formation), extending it to a non-formation context. Combined name+capacity widget (Shape D primitive applied per-GP).

widget_id: type or print name and capacity_2
label_verbatim: (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signature row
rationale: Second general-partner signer. If the LP has more than 2 GPs, additional signatures must go on attached pages (the form has no exhibit-letter widget for additional GPs).

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: [ ] The organizing document for the converted (resulting) organization is attached as Exhibit ___, and made a part hereof
rationale: Radio option: resulting entity requires SOS filing (organizing document attached). Enum value: 'filing_required'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box2.

label_verbatim: SEVENTH: [ ] The converted (resulting) is an organization not required to file with the Maine Secretary of State's office
rationale: Radio option: resulting entity does not require Maine SOS filing (e.g., general partnership, sole prop). Enum value: 'no_filing_required'. Mutually exclusive with Check Box1.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1; universal handle for entity name on this filing.

label_verbatim: Name of entity [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2 (typically the bundled formation form's resulting entity).

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.

label_verbatim: 24-hour expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.

label_verbatim: Immediate expedited filing
rationale: Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'. Note: widget named 'cover' (not 'cover5') on this template.

label_verbatim: Total fee(s) enclosed: $
rationale: Total fees ($150 base per page-0 header plus expedite premium and bundled formation fee).

label_verbatim: (Name of contact person)
rationale: Contact name.

label_verbatim: (Daytime telephone number)
rationale: Contact phone.

label_verbatim: (Contact email address for this filing)
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.

label_verbatim: (Name of attested copy recipient)
rationale: Recipient name.

label_verbatim: (Firm or Company)
rationale: Recipient firm.

label_verbatim: (Mailing Address)
rationale: Recipient street.

label_verbatim: (City, State & Zip)
rationale: Recipient city/state/zip combined.
